title: arundinella peruviana
intro: Arundinella peruviana is a species of grass native to Peru, scientifically classified within the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Arundinella peruviana include its ability to relieve symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Arundinella peruviana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to make poultices and salves for topical application.
